Just West/Southwest of parking lot in Bolivar Heights are multiple clusters of Pawpaw trees. I was there in November, so I do not know how productive they are. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
560 Prospect Ave, Harpers Ferry, WV 25425, USA
